figures.caption: North Carolina census tract polygons reprojected to a meter-based CRS (EPSG:32119) for distance calculations, preserving GEOID.
Hazardous waste facility point locations reprojected to the same projected (meter-based) CRS as the tract layer.
Centroid point locations for North Carolina Census tracts keyed by GEOID.
GEOID-keyed table of asthma prevalence joined with hazardous-waste proximity metrics.
North Carolina tract polygons joined with asthma prevalence and highway proximity attributes.
Census tract Getis-Ord Gi* hotspot/coldspot classification for asthma prevalence (Queen contiguity).
Boxplots comparing nearest hardware distance and hardware counts within 5 km between significant asthma hotspots (Gi* p<0.05, z>0) and all other tracts.
OLS coefficients for asthma prevalence with interaction terms; inference uses heteroskedasticity-robust (HC1) standard errors.
OLS model diagnostics for asthma prevalence interaction model (R², adjusted R², AIC/BIC, RMSE, and sample size).
Variance inflation factors (VIF) for predictors in the asthma prevalence interaction model.
Variance inflation factors (VIF) for GWR predictor variables to assess multicollinearity.
Geographically weighted regression (adaptive bisquare kernel; bandwidth selected by AICc) local coefficients for asthma prevalence predictors and local R² by tract GEOID.
